metadata.title: Hallilha — Sharia compliance, automated for SMEs
metadata.description: AI-powered Islamic finance platform. Automate Shariah compliance, purification tracking, and zakat reporting in one workspace.
metadata.ogDescription: Real-time Sharia auditing, purification, and zakat dashboards for modern SMEs.

hero.title: Hallilha… your financial future, on
hero.description: A modern financial system for SMEs. Automate compliance, ensure purification, and grow wealth with complete ethical confidence.

about.title: Built for the
about.missionBody: Hallilha was founded on a simple conviction: every Muslim founder deserves access to world-class Islamic financial tools — without the prohibitive cost of traditional Sharia boards. We automate compliance so you can focus on building.
about.point1: Automated Sharia auditing for SMEs and freelancers across the MENA region
about.point2: Real-time purification tracking so you never unknowingly mix funds
about.point3: Partnered with leading Islamic finance scholars and regional banks

features.title: A complete ethical system
features.description: Enterprise-grade tools made simple for SMEs to maintain 100% Shariah compliance.

auditor.title: Smart AI Auditor
auditor.description: An AI chat interface that reviews contracts and transactions against approved fatwas in real time — available 24/7.

purification.title: Automatic Purification
purification.description: Automatically identify and isolate non-compliant income sources to track purification with pinpoint accuracy.

contracts.title: Contract Templates
contracts.description: Access a library of pre-audited, ready-to-use Musharakah, Mudarabah, and Murabahah agreements.

zakat.title: Zakat Dashboard
zakat.description: Automatic calculations for hawl and nisab across your entire business portfolio, ready to pay.

realtime.title: Real-time Monitoring
realtime.description: Connect your bank accounts for live cash-flow auditing. Every transaction is scored the moment it lands.

secure.title: Bank-grade Security
secure.description: 256-bit encryption, SOC 2 compliant infrastructure, and your credentials are never stored on our servers.

contact.title: Let's start a
contact.subtitle: Have a question or want to see a demo? Our team typically responds within 24 hours.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us how we can help you…
contact.success: Message sent! We'll be in touch soon.

items.q: Is Hallilha certified by a Sharia Supervisory Board?
items.a: Yes. All compliance rules, purification calculations, and contract templates on Hallilha have been reviewed and approved by our Sharia Supervisory Board, composed of certified Islamic finance scholars.

When Hallilha detects a non-compliant income source (such as interest income from a conventional bank account), it automatically quarantines the flagged amount in a 'Purification Queue'. You can then easily donate it to a charity of your choice directly from the dashboard.

items.q: Can I connect my existing business bank account?
items.a: Yes. Hallilha integrates with major banks in the MENA region via secure open-banking APIs. We use 256-bit encryption and never store your bank credentials.

The Zakat Dashboard automatically tracks your business's assets over the lunar year (hawl) and calculates your exact Zakat obligation based on your current nisab threshold. It generates a ready-to-pay Zakat report at year end.
The Startup tier is permanently free for freelancers and solo founders. For Growth and Enterprise features, we offer a 14-day free trial with no credit card required.
Hallilha fully supports both Arabic (RTL) and English, with more languages planned. The entire platform — including the AI auditor — works in both languages.

footer.copyright: © 2025 Hallilha. Audited by the Shariah Supervisory Board.
